body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This PR does a few things to the longruns:
- Add aquaplanet setups testing the atmosphere with ED only and diagnostic EDMF setups
- Remove the atmos-only longrun, since it isn't the coupler's responsibility to run standalone atmosphere simulations.
- Increase the conservation limit, since recent slabplanet longruns have failed the conservation check. It's not clear when exactly the conservation worsened, since these runs have been failing for different reasons for 4 months. It should be independent of recent changes to regridding and the independent boundary space, since these runs still use the atmos horizontal space as the boundary space.

title: some longrun fixes
